name: 28" Dia Round Wooden Beaded Wall Mirror Natural - Threshold™: Beaded Detail, No Assembly Required
description: Create an artistic centerpiece on any wall with the Round Wooden Beaded Wall Mirror from Threshold™. This round decorative mirror is enclosed in a light brown wooden frame inlaid with beaded detailing for a touch of visual intrigue. With its striking beauty, this accent mirror brings a room to life and helps brighten up your area by allowing light to bounce around wherever you hang it. Due to lighting and monitor differences, actual colors and finishes may vary slightly from what appears online
